sections.title: Using a spade on the tree when not in building mode
Using a spade on tree for the first time

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... I thought I'd turn you around a bit.

lines.speaker: Spirit tree
lines.text: Turn... Turn me around? Are you uprooting me?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... Yes, well, I need to in order to-

lines.speaker: Spirit tree
lines.text: What reason could you possibly have to rotate me?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought you might look nicer facing the other way.

lines.speaker: Spirit Tree
lines.text: Look... Nicer?! I'm a living being!

lines.speaker: Spirit tree
lines.text: Argh! My connection to the Anima Mundi! The pain!

lines.speaker: Spirit tree
lines.text: This is unconscionable! I am not an object! I am a sentient creature with hopes and dreams!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All done. See, that wasn't so bad.

lines.speaker: Spirit tree
lines.text: The pain... I can feel parts of me fading away... oh Guthix...
